basic_details.job_title: AMC Sahayak Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 250 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Daily Current Affairs 23 June 2026: Download Free PDF Now

application_fee.details: The application fee for AMC Assistant Senior Clerk 2026 must be paid online by 09 July 2026. Divyangjan (PwD) candidates are fully exempted from paying any fee. Fee once paid is non-refundable.

age_limit.details: The age limit for AMC Assistant Senior Clerk 2026 is calculated as on the last date of online application submission (07 July 2026). Candidates must be at least 18 years of age and must not exceed 38 years. However, various age relaxations apply as detailed below. The upper age limit in no case shall exceed 45 years for any candidate (except current AMC employees). | Note: Reserved category candidates applying for unreserved posts will not receive age relaxation benefits.

qualification.details: Before applying for AMC Assistant Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026, candidates must verify they meet both the educational qualification and the relevant work experience requirement. Both conditions must be satisfied simultaneously. | Candidates must hold a Bachelor's degree in any discipline with a minimum of 50% marks from any University established under Central or State Act in India, or from an Institution recognised or declared as Deemed University under Section 3 of the UGC Act, 1956. | Candidates must have at least 3 years of combined or separate administrative cadre experience in any of the following types of organisations: | Government / Local Self-Government institutions / Government undertakings / Semi-government bodies / Boards / Corporations / Municipal Corporations Companies registered under Companies Act 1956 or 2013 Co-operative societies registered under Co-operative Societies Act 2012 | The experience must have been in a regular pay scale - either through direct recruitment or under the Gujarat Government Finance Department's fixed pay scheme (Resolution dated 16/02/2006, Ref. Kharach/2002/57/Z-1) on fixed or ex-gratia fixed salary basis. | Experience that will NOT be counted: Part-time, daily wage, apprenticeship, trainee, articleship, honorary/invited faculty, in-charge additional duties, or experience gained during study period (e.g., Ph.D., research fellowships, internships) will not be treated as valid experience. Only an offer letter or appointment letter alone is also not accepted as proof - supporting documents such as increment orders, pay-related records, or other substantive evidence must be provided alongside. | Candidates must hold a certificate of Basic Computer Knowledge as per the syllabus fixed by the Gujarat State General Administration Department (Resolution dated 13/08/2008 and 18/03/2016, Ref. CRR/10/2007/120320/G5) from any recognised training institution, OR hold a Diploma/Degree/Certificate in computer knowledge from a government-recognised university/institution, OR have studied Computer as a subject in Standard 10 or Standard 12. | Candidates who do not hold such a certificate at the time of application may still apply, but must obtain and produce the CCC (for Class 3 posts) or CCC+ (for Class 1 and 2) certificate before joining. If they join without it, they must clear the examination within one year of joining. | Also Read: UPSC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - 538 Vacancies | DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

salary_details.pay scale (after assessment): Level 4, Pay Matrix: ₹25,500 – ₹81,100 + Grade Pay as per rules
salary_details.details: Selected candidates for AMC Assistant Senior Clerk will initially be placed on a fixed pay basis for three years, after which their performance will be evaluated and regular pay will be applied as per the Pay Matrix. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

faq.question: Q1. What is AMC Sahayak Senior Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a recruitment drive by Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation (AMC) for filling Assistant and Senior Clerk posts in various departments.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 250 vacancies have been announced for Assistant and Senior Clerk posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for AMC Clerk posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application start date?
faq.answer: The online application process starts from 23 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for AMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 07 July 2026.
